name: voice-ai-extension
description: Voice AI — text-to-speech extension for Chrome and Firefox. Reads selected text using browser-native voices or your own Groq API key.
author: Stanislav Shupilkin

scripts.zip: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../voice-ai-extension.zip ./*
scripts.zip:firefox: npm run build:firefox && cd dist-firefox && zip -r ../voice-ai-extension-firefox.zip ./*
scripts.ff:run: npm run build:firefox && web-ext run --source-dir dist-firefox
scripts.ff:lint: npm run build:firefox && web-ext lint --source-dir dist-firefox
